crime.value: Judge Pierpont shot and killed by masked gunman
crime.quote: the proof that he shot and killed Judge Pierpont. The only thing they can testify to is a masked man shot the Judge

victim.value: Judge Pierpont, killed for reasons connected to Vergasi case
victim.quote: the proof that he shot and killed Judge Pierpont

closed_world.value: Nautilus Beach area where Wallace operates
closed_world.quote: What I do have is a psychopath killer in Nautilus Beach

culprit_and_motive.value: Vergasi suspected of killing Judge Pierpont, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: What is important now is the arrest and conviction of Vergasi

resolution.value: Applewhite murder solved by Wallace, Judge Pierpont case ongoing
resolution.quote: Robert, congratulations on solving the Applewhite murder

investigator.value: Captain Robert Wallace, police detective with philosophical tendencies
investigator.quote: Robert Wallace sat with his feet up on the desk... Captain Wallace?

suspect_architecture.value: Two primary suspects: Vernon Gray (potential murderer of wife Grace) and Vergasi (psychopath killer who shot Judge Pierpont). Gray has domestic motive, Vergasi has criminal pattern.
suspect_architecture.quote: At this point Vernon Gray was only a potential murderer. Hopefully, at this time I have prevented the death of Grace

red_herring.value: The masked identity of the shooter serves as misdirection - witnesses can only testify to 'a masked man shot the Judge' rather than definitively identifying Vergasi.
red_herring.quote: The only thing they can testify to is a masked man shot the Judge.

clue_fairness.value: Wallace's investigation methods and evidence gaps are transparently shared with reader - no weapon, no witnesses, only suspicion of Vergasi.
clue_fairness.quote: I have no weapon, the firearm used is now in all probability destroyed. What I do have is mere suspicion.

social_world.value: Police hierarchy with Captain Wallace in authority position, restaurant ownership (Marty Hoffman), and judicial system (murdered Judge Pierpont).
social_world.quote: Captain Wallace?' Wallace turned abruptly at the sound, spinning around in his high back desk chair.

reveal_mechanic.value: Wallace's psychological profiling approach using academic texts on violence and biological determinism to understand criminal behavior patterns.
reveal_mechanic.quote: Man is an animal and has an inherited trait that causes violence. That trait in all probability comes from a gene

media_and_audience.value: Television coverage of solved cases creates public recognition - 'the story is all over the television' regarding the Applewhite murder solution.
media_and_audience.quote: Robert, congratulations on solving the Applewhite murder. The story is all over the television

investigator_wound.value: Wallace's isolation and pattern of failed relationships - described as a loner with no close friends who seduces then abandons women.
investigator_wound.quote: I also see you as a loner. I've asked around about you. To my knowledge you have no close friends.

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton the house on timber lane
